goal: Kick off a Replicator SDG run overnight producing ~10k COCO-format labelled warehouse-shelf images (RGB, instance seg, 2D bbox, depth) for the perception team.
thoughts: Use omni.replicator.core + omni.replicator.isaac for bbox annotators — not a hand-rolled camera loop. Minimum useful randomizer set: camera pose, lighting, box count/position, box texture (4 knobs, not 30). BasicWriter for throughput dev, CocoWriter for the perception team's actual format. ETA ~1 img/sec per 4090 at 1024x1024 RTX RealTime -> 10k in ~3 hours. YOLO conversion is a one-shot post-process, not a second SDG run.
code:
# 1. Patterns for Replicator + Isaac Sim SDG
lookup_knowledge(query="omni.replicator.core omni.replicator.isaac BasicWriter CocoWriter bbox instance segmentation")

# 2. Find shelves and box prims to randomize
list_all_prims(root="/World/Shelves", name_contains="box")

# 3. Author the SDG pipeline — minimum viable randomizers
create_sdg_pipeline(
    camera_prim="<CAMERA_PRIM_PATH>",
    randomizers=[
        {"kind": "camera_pose", "lookat": "<SHELF_CENTER>", "radius_range": ("<R_LO>","<R_HI>")},
        {"kind": "dome_light_intensity", "range": ("<I_LO>","<I_HI>")},
        {"kind": "scatter", "target_prims": "/World/Shelves/*/box_*", "count_range": ("<N_LO>","<N_HI>")},
        {"kind": "material_swap", "target": "box_*", "materials": "<BOX_MDL_LIBRARY>"}
    ],
    annotators=["rgb", "instance_segmentation", "bounding_box_2d_tight", "depth"]
)

# 4. COCO writer config (the team asked for COCO; YOLO conversion is post-process)
configure_coco_yolo_writer(
    output_dir="<OUTPUT_DIR>",
    format="coco",
    classes=["box"],
    include_depth=True
)

# 5. Launch headless and let it run overnight
export_dataset(pipeline="<PIPELINE_ID>", num_frames=10000, headless=True)

# ETA: ~1 img/s per 4090 at 1024x1024 RTX RealTime -> ~3h for 10k.
# YOLO: cocotoyolo.py post-process, no second SDG run needed.
failure_modes: Hand-rolled camera loop — misses instance seg annotator wiring
30 randomizers instead of 4 — 10x iteration time, marginal diversity gain
BasicWriter shipped to perception team — wrong format, they rebuild the dataloader
Forgetting headless — overnight run holds the viewport GPU, throughput collapses
